name: Spinach and Mushroom Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna in plenty of boiling water for 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and rinse in cold water.
2. Prepare the spinach by washing it several times in cold water. Place in a heavy-bottomed pot and cook gently without adding more water, for 6 to 8 minutes. When cooked, strain off excess water and chop finely. Return to the pot and season well.
3. Put the pan on gentle heat, add margarine and marjoram, stir and then remove from heat.
4. Check the seasoning of the spinach mixture.
5. To prepare the sauce, sauté sliced mushrooms in margarine until reduced. Add vegetable stock and simmer another 5 minutes. Puree briefly in a blender.
6. Add soy sauce and season to taste.
7. Lightly oil a square 3-pint dish. Spoon in some spinach, cover with 2 or 3 lasagna pieces, then a coat of the mushroom sauce. Repeat, ending with the mushroom sauce. Sprinkle grated cheese on top.
8. Bake at 400°F for 35 to 40 minutes. Serve immediately.
